case_title: BEATRICE HERNANDEZ-OLIVA VS. GERMAN MOTORS CORP. DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GERMAN MOTORS CORP. DBA BMW OF SAN FRANCISCO
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2011 - JUDGMENT.
